purpose: Operational perceptual case record for controlled corpus conversion before scoring integration.

extracted_facts.definition: Directly extracted public-source facts. No interpretation.

visual_observations.definition: Observable surface behavior tied to a source anchor. Can describe visible composition, pacing, typography, motifs, density, hierarchy, interaction, and motion.

strategic_interpretations.definition: Brand3 interpretation derived from facts and observations. Must remain conditional when intent is not explicitly stated.

unsupported_or_low_confidence_inferences.definition: Useful but weak readings that should not feed downstream systems without review.

contradictions.definition: Explicit mapping between a stated claim and an observed or weakly observed signal.

evidence_contract.rule: Every fact, observation, interpretation, inference, and contradiction must carry at least one evidence object.

high.definition: Visible or stated directly in a source anchor, or repeated across independently anchored observations.
minimum_basis: direct support level or multiple corroborating anchors
examples: visible repeated motif in local visual observation artifact

medium.definition: Reasonable interpretation from public copy or from one anchored visual observation, but not independently repeated.
examples: system behavior inferred from one page section

low.definition: A plausible but weak inference from aesthetics, copy tone, or incomplete evidence.
